author: ShadyTidus
name: ShadyFlags
short: ML-powered suspect detection with two-tier network
description: Comprehensive flag system with ML-based risk scoring. Automatically detects suspicious accounts on join and adds them to a suspect network. When mods take action (ban/kick), suspects are promoted to the confirmed bad actor network, creating labeled training data for the ML model. Features include: two-tier network (suspect → confirmed), historical mod log scanning for bootstrap, ShadyAlts integration for toxic alt detection, confidence-based flagging, and automatic ML training data generation.
install_msg:
ShadyFlags v3.0 installed!

**Quick Setup:**
1. `/flagset channel` - Set mod log channel (REQUIRED)
2. `/flagnetwork scan` - Scan mod log history to bootstrap network

**How it works:**
• New members are risk-scored on join
• High risk → Added to SUSPECT network + flagged with confidence %
• When you ban a suspect for bot/spam → Moved to CONFIRMED network
• Confirmed data trains the ML model

**Commands:**
- `/flag` - Manage flags
- `/flagqueue` - Review flagged users
- `/flagnetwork stats` - View suspect/confirmed stats
- `/flagnetwork scan` - Bootstrap from mod log history
- `/flagml` - ML model management
end_user_data_statement: This cog stores user IDs, flag data, join features for ML training, suspect network data, and confirmed bad actor network data.
